name: Savory Seafood Trio Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients except eggs, bread crumbs, and butter.
2. Add the eggs to the mixture and stir carefully.
3. Combine the bread crumbs and butter in a separate dish.
4. Sprinkle the bread crumb mixture evenly over the top of the casserole.
5. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
